restaurants.name: PARRILLA DON JULIO
restaurants.notes: Parrilla Don Julio, situated in the heart of Buenos Aires' vibrant Palermo district, is a true institution in the world's culinary scene, famed for its exceptional Argentine cuisine and warm hospitality. Owner and sommelier Pablo Rivero has established himself as a pioneer in the meat and wine industry, elevating the traditional Parrilla experience to extraordinary heights. Under Pablo's stewardship, Don Julio has gained a reputation not only for its impeccably grilled meats but also for its impressive wine list, meticulously curated to complement the flavours of the beef. His expertise in selecting the perfect wine pairings enhances each meal, creating a harmonious dining experience that delights meat lovers from around the world. His commitment to excellence is matched by Guido Tassi, hailed as the Meat Master, whose deep understanding of meat aging and butchery techniques significantly contributes to the restaurant's reputation. The restaurant itself exudes a rustic classy charm, with walls adorned with wine bottles signed by patrons, lending a personal touch that adds to the welcoming atmosphere. The service is impeccable, with a knowledgeable staff that embodies the genuine care and passion that Pablo Rivero instills in his team. Pablo's achievements extend beyond the grill. He is recognised for his commitment to quality and sustainability, sourcing meats from trusted local producers and emphasising animal welfare and natural grazing. This commitment is palpable in the superior taste and quality of the dishes served at Don Julio. Parrilla Don Julio is not just a restaurant; it's a testament to Pablo Rivero's vision and dedication to the art of meat and wine. It stands as a beacon of culinary excellence in Buenos Aires and far beyond, offering an unforgettable dining experience that perfectly captures the essence of Argentine cuisine. Parrilla Don Julio - our old and new No. 1 of the World’s 101 Best Steak Restaurants.

restaurants.name: BODEGA EL CAPRICHO
restaurants.notes: Bodega El Capricho in Jiménez de Jamuz, under the stewardship of owner José Gordon, stands out as a carnivore's paradise, renowned for its profound dedication to the art of meat. This rustic eatery, nestled in the picturesque Spanish countryside, is more than just a restaurant—it's a destination where meat lovers converge to experience some of the world’s best beef and where „farm to fork“ eating means much more than a marketing slogan. José Gordon, the visionary behind El Capricho, is not only the owner but also a recognised expert in the field of meat. His passion for oxen and sustainable farming practices has earned him international acclaim, with many praising his commitment to aging and butchering techniques that highlight the meat's natural flavours. Gordon's expertise together with his head chef Diego Zarate ensures that every cut served is a showcase of both his skill and his respect for the animal. The ambiance at El Capricho is authentically Spanish, with a charmingly traditional décor that complements its rural setting. The open grill, where diners can watch as their meals are expertly prepared, adds an engaging, immersive element to the dining experience. The menu is a testament to the purity of traditional Spanish cuisine, focusing on simplicity to allow the quality of the meat to shine through. From the legendary Ox steaks to lesser known dishes like the amazing Ox tongue or the in-cellar cured Ox cecina, each plate is a culinary masterpiece. Bodega El Capricho offers an unforgettable dining experience that transcends the ordinary, thanks to José Gordon’s mastery and passion for meat. It's a must-visit for anyone seeking to understand the true artistry behind some of the finest beef in the world. This year, José was honoured with the Lifetime Achievement Award for his enduring efforts and commitment to the respectful and sustainable treatment of cattle and the valuable product, meat.

restaurants.name: MARGARET
restaurants.notes: Nestled in the upscale precinct of Double Bay, Sydney, Margaret emerges as an exceptional dining venue, ranking impressively high among new entries. This restaurant showcases the apex of Australian cuisine with a pronounced focus on impeccably crafted steaks, under the expert stewardship of renowned Chef Neil Perry. With an interior that marries refinement with relaxation, Margaret captures the sophisticated essence of its neighbourhood. Its ambiance is universally inviting, suitable for a diverse range of dining occasions. Inside, the elegance of the decor complements an atmosphere that's as welcoming as it is chic, ensuring every guest feels both comfortable and cherished. The menu at Margaret is a testament to culinary brilliance, blending innovative approaches with revered traditions, and consistently maintaining extraordinary quality. The steaks, notable highlights of the dining experience, come from the finest Australian producers and are a dream for any steak enthusiast. Prepared with consummate skill, each cut is served having been aged and cooked to enhance its rich flavours and tender textures. But Margaret offers more than just its exceptional steaks. The menu celebrates a bounty of local produce through dishes that are both inventive and comforting, capturing the spirit of modern Australian cuisine. Complementing these flavours is a meticulously curated wine list that spans local gems and international favourites, perfect for pairing with the restaurant’s offerings. Service at Margaret is nothing short of exemplary; staff members are both attentive and knowledgeable, enhancing the dining experience with their professionalism. Margaret stands as more than a restaurant; it is a destination that honours the fine dining culture of Australia, particularly with its specialty in premium steaks. A beacon of Chef Neil Perry's lasting legacy on the Australian culinary landscape, Margaret is a compelling destination for both locals and international diners, promising an unforgettable experience in the heart of Sydney. Margaret - our No. 3 of the list and highest new entry.

restaurants.name: COTE
restaurants.notes: Cote in New York has masterfully blended the high-energy atmosphere of a Korean BBQ with the polished feel of an American steakhouse, creating a truly unique dining experience that has captured the hearts of food enthusiasts. Nestled in the vibrant Flatiron District, this Korean-inspired steakhouse isn’t just known for its superb cuisine but is also renowned for its exceptional, award-winning wine list. The heart of Cote's menu is its "Butcher's Feast," an assortment of meticulously selected finest USDA cuts that showcase both quality and culinary craft. Each piece of meat is a testament to flavour and texture, designed to be grilled right at your table. Accompanying these prime selections are traditional Korean banchan (side dishes) and vibrant sauces, which add depth and complexity to each bite. The interior of Cote New York mirrors the modern-meets-traditional theme, featuring sleek lines and dark hues that set a chic yet welcoming tone. The atmosphere buzzes with energy, made all the more dynamic by the sight of diners engaging with the interactive cooking experience. This culinary journey is heightened by Cote’s impressive 1,200+ positions wine list, which has been thoughtfully curated to complement the rich flavours of the grilled meats. Each wine is selected to enhance the dining experience, making every meal both a gastronomic and a vinous discovery. Expanding beyond New York, Cote has also planted its flag in Miami and Singapore, bringing its celebrated formula to a global audience. These locations echo the original’s commitment to quality and innovation, each adapted to fit its unique cultural and culinary landscape while maintaining the high standards set by the New York flagship. For anyone seeking a fusion of classic American steakhouse heft with Korean culinary finesse, Cote offers a dining experience that's both globally inspired and comfortingly familiar. From New York to Miami and Singapore, Cote continues to impress, making it a standout destination for those who cherish a meal that is as much an event as it is a feast. Cote New York - our No. 4 and best steak restaurant in North America.

restaurants.name: CARCASSE
restaurants.notes: Carcasse in Koksijde: A Meat Lover's Culinary Eden Located in the picturesque town of Koksijde, Carcasse stands as a beacon for those devoted to the art of meat. Led by the distinguished head chef Timon Michiels, this restaurant is a shrine to high-quality, sustainably sourced meats, expertly woven into dishes that resonate with both innovation and deep respect for traditional practices. From the moment one steps into Carcasse, the atmosphere envelops guests in a warm embrace, blending rustic butcher shop aesthetics with a touch of modern sophistication. The decor is a thoughtful reflection of the restaurant's commitment to fusing the old with the new, creating a space that is both authentic and inviting. The heart of the restaurant is its open kitchen, where chef Timon and his team perform culinary ballet. Diners have the unique opportunity to witness the meticulous preparation of each dish, observing as each ingredient is transformed under the skilled hands of the culinary team. Chef Michiels's mastery is evident across the menu - where undoubtedly steak cuts are the star of the show -, which is a dynamic showcase of local produce with a strong emphasis on artisanal meat dishes. Each plate is a testament to his profound understanding of flavour and technique, presenting traditional cuts in innovative and enticing ways. The restaurant’s dedication to quality and sustainability shines through in their carefully selected ingredients and the seasonal rotation of the menu, ensuring a fresh and exciting experience with each visit. Carcasse is more than just a dining destination; it's a journey into the heart of meat lovers cuisine, guided by the visionary hands of Hendrik Dierendonck and Timon Michiels. With each dish not only delighting the palate but also upholding the principles of sustainability, Carcasse offers a dining experience that is both indulgent and responsible. For meat aficionados and culinary explorers alike, Carcasse in Koksijde is a must-visit venue that promises an unforgettable exploration of flavours, artfully led by a young chef with a bright future ahead. A second Carcasse will be opening in the beautiful seaside city of Knokke soon. We are not the only ones who are excited.

restaurants.name: I DUE CIPPI
restaurants.notes: Located in the charming town of Saturnia, Italy, I due Cippi restaurant run by brothers Alessandro and Lorenzo Aniello offers an exquisite culinary experience that marries tradition with innovation. Upon entering, guests are greeted with a cozy yet elegant interior, adorned with rustic accents that evoke a sense of Italian countryside charm. The soft lighting and soothing music create an inviting atmosphere perfect for a romantic dinner or a gathering with friends and family. The menu at I due Cippi is a testament to the chef's commitment to radical quality and creativity where only the best produce find its way on the menu. Drawing inspiration from the rich culinary heritage of Tuscany, each dish is crafted with precision and expertise. The stars of the show are the best steak cuts from leading suppliers around the world like rare Black Angus from Italy or Japanese Wagyu from the Kobe prefecture. One standout dish is the on-site for a minimum of 60 days dry-aged Rubia Gallega cooked on the bespoke open fire grill. Another highlight is the medium-rare grilled Chianina steak, expertly cooked to perfection by chef-owner Lorenzo and bursting with juicy, savoury goodness. Complementing the exquisite fare is an impressive wine selection curated by Alessandro Aniello, featuring both local gems and international varietals. The attentive staff is more than happy to offer recommendations to enhance your dining experience. What truly sets I due Cippi apart is its dedication to sourcing the finest ingredients, many of which are locally sourced from nearby farms and vineyards. This commitment to freshness and sustainability shines through in every dish, elevating the dining experience to new heights. I due Cippi is a hidden gem nestled in the heart of Saturnia, offering a culinary journey that delights the senses and leaves a lasting impression. Whether you're a connoisseur of Italian open fire cuisine or simply looking for an unforgettable dining experience, this unique restaurant is not to be missed.

restaurants.name: LAIA ERRETEGIA
restaurants.notes: Restaurant Laia run by the Ayala family, located in the picturesque town of Hondarribia, Spain, offers a truly unique dining experience that seamlessly blends traditional Basque culinary techniques with innovative, modern twists. Set against a backdrop of historic charm, the restaurant's ambiance is warm and inviting, perfect for both casual diners and gourmet enthusiasts. The menu at Laia is a testament to the rich culinary heritage of the Basque region, authentic grilled flavours, focusing on locally sourced ingredients and seasonal offerings with a strong emphasis on quality meats. Highlights include their 60 days dry-aged Côte de Boeuf from local breeds, prepared with unrivalled precision that brings out all characteristics of this amazing beef quality. The creativity of the kitchen shines through in dishes like the „riz avec palourdes“ and the grilled scallops. What sets Laia apart is not just its food but also its impeccable service helmed by Arantza the sister of grill master and head chef Jon. The staff is knowledgeable and eager to share their passion for Basque cuisine, providing recommendations and explaining the origins and preparation of each dish. This enhances the overall dining experience, making each meal both educational and enjoyable. Additionally, the restaurant boasts a carefully curated selection of wines that complement their dishes beautifully, featuring both local and international vintages. The pairing suggestions provided by Arantza can elevate the meal to an extraordinary culinary journey. Restaurant Laia is a destination where food lovers can indulge in a rich tapestry of flavours and textures. It's a must-visit for anyone looking to explore the best of what Basque cuisine has to offer.

restaurants.name: ROCKPOOL BAR & GRILL
restaurants.notes: Rockpool Bar & Grill in Sydney offers an exquisite blend of ambiance, service, and culinary expertise, making it a standout in the city's vibrant dining scene. Housed in an art deco building in the heart of the city, the restaurant's grand dining room, with its high ceilings and elegant decor, sets a lavish stage for a memorable dining experience. At Rockpool, the menu crafted by young star chef Santiago Aristizabal who has recently been appointed Executive chef is a tribute to top-quality Australian produce, with a particular emphasis on superbly cooked steaks and fresh seafood. The beef is sourced directly from leading premier producers like David Blackmore, Coppertree Farms or Cape Grim and dry aged on the premises. The steak selection is unparalleled, featuring cuts like the Cape Grim dry-aged ribeye as well as the Blackmore dry-aged Rubia Gallega, which is celebrated for its intense flavour and impeccable texture. Seafood dishes, such as the Rock lobster with Kombu butter, showcase the quality and purity of the ingredients. The wine list is as impressive as the food with 3,000+ positions, boasting an extensive collection of Australian wines alongside international stars, thoughtfully curated to complement the menu. The knowledgeable sommeliers are eager to assist with pairings, enhancing the overall dining experience. Service at Rockpool Bar & Grill is in a class of its own. The staff are professional yet approachable, demonstrating a deep understanding of the menu and a genuine enthusiasm for hospitality. Their attention to detail ensures that each guest feels well cared for throughout their visit. Rockpool Bar & Grill is not just a restaurant; it's a culinary institution in Sydney. It offers a flawless combination of sophisticated atmosphere, exceptional food, and exemplary service, making it a must-visit for anyone looking for an outstanding dining experience in the city.

restaurants.name: AG
restaurants.notes: Restaurang AG in Stockholm is a paradise for meat lovers, blending impeccable Swedish craftsmanship with a classic steakhouse vibe. Tucked away in an old silver factory in the trendy area of Kungsholmen, the industrial chic decor—complete with exposed beams and metallic accents—sets the stage for a dining experience that is both rugged and refined. The heart of AG’s menu is its selection of premium meats from Europe and beyond, sourced from top local and international suppliers. The dry-aged Swedish sirloin is a standout, known for its deep flavour and perfect marbling, grilled over an open flame to achieve a sublime char and tenderness. For those looking for something truly special, the Swedish old-cow porterhouse cut dry-aged for at least 30 days followed by another 10 weeks of tallow ageing offers a lavish feast that’s both impressive in size and quality. Beyond steaks, AG also offers a variety of other dishes that showcase the best of Swedish and Nordic cuisine. The fish dishes, particularly the whole Turbot or the Merlangius roe from Bottenviken served on Brioche, is a must-try, offering a Nordic inspired delicate flavour that's hard to find elsewhere. The wine list is expansive and carefully curated, featuring both classic favourites and rare finds that complement the robust flavours of the food. The knowledgeable staff are adept at guiding guests through the selections to find the perfect match for their meal. Service at Restaurang AG is top-notch. The team is attentive without being intrusive, contributing to an atmosphere that is welcoming and very professional. Restaurang AG is a celebration of quality and craftsmanship. It stands out as a must-visit destination in Stockholm for anyone looking to enjoy some of the finest meats and service the city has to offer.

restaurants.name: CUT AT 45 PARK LANE
restaurants.notes: Cut at 45 Park Lane in London helmed by Executive chef Elliott Grover offers a sophisticated and glamorous dining experience that stands out in the city’s competitive culinary scene. Situated within the iconic 45 Park Lane hotel, this restaurant exudes luxury, from its sleek, modern decor to the attentive service and exceptional food. Renowned chef Wolfgang Puck's influence is evident in every aspect of the menu, which focuses on premium steaks and a range of creative, contemporary dishes. The steaks, sourced from the finest farms in the UK, the US, Japan and Australia, are the true stars here. Each cut is expertly cooked on a bespoke Konro grill to bring out the unique flavours and textures, with the 28 day dry-aged UK Ribeye or the A5 Japanese Wagyu from Kagoshima being a particular highlight for its rich marbling and deep, succulent taste. The menu also features a variety of seafood options, like the grilled Cornish dover sole and the Saffron Risotto with lobster, which are both delicate and perfectly prepared. The starters, such as the steak tartare bites with black truffle and the bigeye yellowfin tuna tartare, complement the main dishes beautifully. The wine list at Cut is impressively comprehensive, featuring an extensive selection of international wines that have been thoughtfully chosen to pair with the flavours of the food. The knowledgeable sommeliers are always ready to provide recommendations that enhance your meal. Service at Cut is impeccable. The staff are professional and highly attentive, ensuring a seamless dining experience that makes guests feel truly special. Every detail, from the moment you are seated to the finishing touches of your dessert, is handled with care and precision. Cut at 45 Park Lane is a culinary highlight. It’s an ideal choice for those looking to indulge in a luxurious steak restaurant experience in the heart of Mayfair.

restaurants.name: VICTOR CHURCHILL
restaurants.notes: Culinary Craftsmanship: Restaurant Victor Churchill, Melbourne Restaurant Victor Churchill in Melbourne is an exemplary showcase of gastronomy that seamlessly blends fine dining with a theatrical display of butchery. Situated in the chic neighbourhood of Armadale, this establishment extends the legendary Sydney butcher’s brand into a culinary experience that is both unique and exquisite. The decor at Victor Churchill is nothing short of stunning. It combines old-world charm with modern elegance, featuring a beautifully curated interior that includes glass-walled meat aging cabinets and sleek, contemporary furnishings. The ambiance is sophisticated yet welcoming, making it an ideal spot for special occasions or a luxurious night out. The menu revolves around premium meats, each dish crafted to highlight the quality and flavours of the cuts. The 9+ Stone Axe Wagyu sirloin or the Rangers Valley Black Bistecca are a standout, renowned for its depth of flavour and tenderness. Whether it's a perfectly seared steak or a rare breed Kurobuta pork porchetta, the dishes at Victor Churchill are a celebration of the art of butchery. The restaurant also offers a selection of beautifully prepared sides and starters, like the Wagyu Bresaola perfectly sliced or the Jamon Iberico Puff each designed to complement a fantastic dining experience. Service at Restaurant Victor Churchill is impeccable. The staff are knowledgeable and passionate about their offerings, providing insights into the sourcing and preparation of the dishes. The wine list with positions from the old- and new world is thoughtfully selected to pair beautifully with the menu. Restaurant Victor Churchill is an exploration of culinary artistry in an atmosphere of refined elegance. A visit here promises not just to satiate but to inspire.

restaurants.name: HAWKSMOOR
restaurants.notes: Hawksmoor in Dublin is a remarkable addition to the city’s culinary landscape, offering a dining experience that combines the grandeur of British steakhouse traditions with a dash of local Irish flair. Situated in the historic National Bank Building, the restaurant’s ambiance strikes a perfect balance between elegant and welcoming, with its rich wood paneling and soft lighting that create an atmosphere ideal for both romantic evenings and business dinners. The focus at Hawksmoor is undoubtedly on the quality of its steaks, which are sourced from the best British and Irish farms. Each cut, from the bone-in prime rib to the succulent fillet, is cooked over real charcoal, imparting a depth of flavour that is both rich and nuanced. The dry-aged grass-fed ribeye, offers a distinctive texture and taste that is a testament to fantastic beef quality and the expert grilling techniques employed. Beyond steaks, the menu features a variety of seafood and vegetarian options that are equally impressive. The Kelly Gigas oysters with bone marrow are a delightful starter, and the roasted curragh scallops are a must-try, showcasing the versatility and breadth of the offerings. The beverage selection is well selected, featuring a mix of classic cocktails, craft beers, and a wine list with a strong emphasis on the old world. The knowledgeable staff are always on hand to suggest the perfect pairing for your meal, enhancing the dining experience with their expertise. Service at Hawksmoor is exceptional; attentive, knowledgeable, and genuinely enthusiastic about the cuisine and drinks they serve. This level of care ensures that each visit is memorable. Hawksmoor Dublin is a standout establishment that expertly marries impeccable service with culinary excellence. It’s a must-visit for anyone seeking a top-tier steak restaurant experience in Dublin.

restaurants.name: CASA JULIÁN DE TOLOSA
restaurants.notes: Casa Julian in Tolosa, Spain, is a celebrated temple of traditional Basque cuisine, revered especially for its mastery of steak preparation. This iconic restaurant presents a rustic, unpretentious setting where the focus is squarely on the food, particularly the legendary chuletas that draw gastronomes and visitors from around the globe. Entering Casa Julian, diners are enveloped in an ambiance that feels like stepping back in time. The decor is simple and traditional, with wooden tables and chairs that speak of decades of service. The grill, positioned prominently in the dining area, allows guests to witness the skilled grill masters at work, turning cuts of meat into culinary masterpieces over open coals. The menu is intentionally limited, focusing on what Casa Julian does best: steak. The chuleta, sourced from mature Basque cattle, is renowned for its intense flavour and impeccable char. Grilled to perfection, each bite is a testament to the art of simplicity, requiring nothing more than a touch of sea salt to enhance its natural richness. Accompaniments are equally straightforward yet perfectly executed, including green salads tossed with local olive oil and vinegar, mouth-watering and delicious red peppers and not to forget the amazing asparagus from the region. The wine list is compact but carefully curated, featuring regional varietals that pair beautifully with the robust flavours of the meat. Service at Casa Julian is efficient and warmly hospitable, with staff treating diners like family, enhancing the meal with their knowledge and genuine enthusiasm for the cuisine. Casa Julian offers more than just a meal; it provides a profound culinary experience that pays homage to Basque gastronomic traditions. It's a destination where the love of steak is not just understood but celebrated with every seared, sizzling platter served.

restaurants.name: ASADOR BASTIAN
restaurants.notes: Asador Bastian in Chicago offers a delightful culinary journey into the world of Spanish Asador-style cooking, set within a chic and vibrant atmosphere in the bustling River North neighbourhood. This restaurant masterfully combines traditional Basque grilling techniques with a modern aesthetic, creating a warm and inviting space that's perfect for both casual gatherings and special occasions. The menu at Asador Bastian is a showcase of Spanish flavours, with a particular focus on beautifully prepared meats and seafood that are grilled to perfection. The star of the menu is undoubtedly the chuletón from the Holstein or Galician Rubia breed, that is expertly charred on the outside while remaining juicy perfectly medium-rare and flavourful inside. This dish, paired with roasted piquillo peppers and a sprinkle of sea salt, encapsulates the essence of Spanish culinary simplicity and excellence. In addition to the meats, Asador Bastian offers an array of tapas and side dishes that are equally impressive. The cured sardines with salsa verde, the octopus a la plancha and the bone marrow potato purée are must-tries. These dishes not only complement the main courses but are standout offerings in their own right. The wine list is thoughtfully selected, emphasising Spanish positions that pair beautifully with the robust flavours of the menu. The knowledgeable staff are more than willing to recommend the perfect wine to match your meal, enhancing the overall dining experience. Service at Asador Bastian is attentive and enthusiastic. The team is passionate and eager to share their knowledge and recommendations, ensuring that every guest feels both welcomed and well cared for. Asador Bastian is a standout in Chicago's culinary scene, offering an authentic taste of Basque cuisine through its expert grilling and warm hospitality. It’s an excellent choice for anyone looking to indulge in the rich flavours and culinary traditions from this part of the world.

restaurants.name: LOS 33
restaurants.notes: Los 33 in Madrid is a culinary gem that captivates diners with its unique blend of traditional Spanish cuisine and contemporary gastronomic innovation. Located in the vibrant heart of the city, this restaurant boasts an eclectic yet welcoming ambiance, with tastefully modern decor that sets the stage for an unforgettable dining experience. The menu at Los 33 is a reflection of the chef's dedication to quality and creativity. Each dish is crafted with precision, focusing on fresh, local ingredients that pay homage to Spanish and South American culinary traditions while incorporating twists that surprise and delight. A standout steak cut is the „Galician Rubia“ dry-aged for 60 days. On the starters and bites side highlights are the veal sweetbreads which are perfectly crispy on the outside while remaining succulent and tender inside as well as the ham croquettes and the iconic grilled Bikini sandwich. The starters and sides provide a perfect introduction to the meal, showcasing the region's best produce. Los 33's wine list is thoughtfully curated, featuring an impressive selection of Spanish wines from various regions, along with international options to suit every palate. The knowledgeable staff are eager to assist in pairing the perfect wine with your meal, enhancing the flavours and overall dining experience. Service at Los 33 is impeccable. The staff are attentive, friendly, and skilled at anticipating the needs of their guests, ensuring that every aspect of the meal is seamless and enjoyable. It masterfully combines tradition and innovation, creating a dining adventure that is both inspiring and memorable.

restaurants.name: AMAREN
restaurants.notes: Restaurant Amaren, nestled in the heart of Bilbao, is a gastronomic gem that serves up Basque cuisine with a contemporary twist. The venue itself strikes a harmonious balance between elegance and comfort, making it a perfect spot for both casual dinners and special occasions. Upon entering Amaren, guests are greeted by a warmly decorated ambiance that combines modern aesthetics with touches of traditional Basque elements. The staff is attentive and knowledgeable, contributing to a welcoming and refined dining experience. The menu at Amaren is a delightful showcase of local ingredients and culinary innovation. Each dish is carefully crafted to highlight the natural flavours and quality of the produce. The standout dishes are undoubtedly the grilled steaks from mainly the Iberian peninsula, which are cooked to perfection by chef Aitor bringing out the deep, natural flavours of the meat. The wine list is thoughtfully curated, featuring a mix of local Basque varietals and international selections, providing excellent pairing options for the dishes. Desserts continue the theme of local and inventive, with options like the cheesecake „Amaren style“, which is creamy and just the right amount of sweet and a fantastic assortment of cheeses by Maître Fromager David Gremmels of Rogue Creamery. Amaren offers a memorable dining experience that skilfully blends traditional Basque flavours with modern culinary techniques. The atmosphere is inviting, the food is exceptional, and the attention to detail is evident in every aspect of the restaurant. It's a must-visit for anyone looking to explore the best of Bilbao's vibrant food scene.

restaurants.name: STEER DINING ROOM
restaurants.notes: Steer Dining Room in Melbourne offers a sophisticated and contemporary take on the traditional steakhouse, setting itself apart with its innovative approach and commitment to quality. Located in the stylish South Yarra neighbourhood, the ambiance of Steer combines urban chic with a touch of elegance, featuring a modern, sleek interior that creates an inviting space for diners. The highlight of Steer Dining Room is undoubtedly its selection of premium steaks, which include a range of local and international cuts. Each piece of meat is chosen for its quality and flavour profile, ensuring that every steak served is of the highest standard. The Wagyu selection including the A5 Kobe Wagyu is particularly impressive, offering a melt-in-your-mouth texture and rich flavours that are enhanced by the precise cooking techniques of the skilled chefs. The menu also features a variety of creative dishes that complement the steaks, such as the prawn Katsu sandwich and Stone Axe Wagyu tenderloin tataki, each prepared with a focus on freshness and flavour. The attention to detail is evident in every dish, making the dining experience at Steer a memorable one. The wine list at Steer Dining Room is extensive, featuring a carefully curated selection of local and international wines that pair beautifully with the menu. The knowledgeable staff are always ready to recommend the perfect wine to enhance your meal, adding an extra layer of enjoyment to the dining experience. Service at Steer is impeccable. The staff are professional, friendly, and attentive, ensuring that every aspect of the dining experience is seamless and enjoyable. In conclusion, Steer Dining Room is a standout establishment in Melbourne’s culinary scene, perfect for those who appreciate the art of steak preparation and fine dining. It's a prime destination for both special occasions and casual, upscale meals.

restaurants.name: LANA
restaurants.notes: Lana in Madrid offers a delightful gastronomic adventure, highlighting the art of Spanish grilling with a touch of Argentine flair. Located in the heart of Madrid, this restaurant exudes a cozy, yet vibrant atmosphere, enhanced by its tasteful decor and intimate seating, which invites diners to relax and enjoy a fantastic meal. The culinary experience at Lana is centred around its expertly grilled meats. The menu features a range of top-quality cuts such as the entraña (skirt steak) and ojo de bife (ribeye), each grilled to perfection. The meats are succulently tender, with a smoky richness that can only be achieved on a traditional Parrilla. The chorizo criollo, a house specialty, is particularly noteworthy for its robust flavour and perfect texture. In addition to its meat offerings, Lana provides a well-rounded menu that includes fresh, grilled vegetables and papas fritas en grasa vacuna. The empanadas, with their flaky pastry and savoury fillings, make for an excellent starter. The wine list at Lana is impressively comprehensive, featuring a selection of Spanish and Argentine wines that beautifully complement the flavours of the grill. The staff are adept at helping diners navigate the choices to find the perfect pairing for their meal. Service is characterised by warmth and efficiency. The staff are attentive and knowledgeable, ensuring that each guest feels both welcomed and well cared for throughout their visit. Lana a must-visit for those in Madrid seeking an authentic Parrilla experience. It combines the best of Spanish and Argentine culinary traditions to offer a dining experience that is both flavourful and heartwarming.

restaurants.name: REGINA BISTECCA
restaurants.notes: Regina Bistecca in Florence stands as a testament to Tuscan culinary tradition, beautifully marrying the rustic charm of the region with a sophisticated dining experience. Tucked away in the historic center of Florence, this restaurant invites diners into a setting that feels both timeless and elegant, highlighted by exposed brick walls and vintage furniture. At the heart of Regina Bistecca's menu is the bistecca alla Fiorentina, a classic Florentine steak that is masterfully prepared. Sourced from local Chianina IGP cattle, the steak is thick-cut, grilled over a wood fire to a perfect char, and served rare, capturing the authentic flavour of the meat with a simple seasoning of salt, pepper, and a touch of olive oil. It's a dish that respects tradition and showcases the quality of ingredients. The menu also offers a variety of other dishes that complement the main attraction. The sides, such as the Fagioli Zolfini drizzled with extra-virgin olive oil and the sautéed creamed spinach, adhere to the simplicity and freshness that characterise Tuscan cuisine. The wine list at Regina Bistecca is thoughtfully curated, featuring an array of local Tuscan wines that pair wonderfully with the hearty flavours of the dishes. The staff are knowledgeable about each selection, providing diners with insightful recommendations that enhance the meal. Service at Regina Bistecca is attentive without being intrusive, reflecting the warmth and hospitality Italy is known for. The servers are passionate about their craft, adding a personal touch that makes the dining experience even more memorable. Regina Bistecca is a jewel in Florence's culinary scene, offering a memorable steak experience that honours the rich gastronomic heritage of Tuscany. It’s an ideal spot for those seeking to indulge in genuine Florentine cuisine in a warm, welcoming atmosphere.

restaurants.name: ELISA
restaurants.notes: Elisa Steakhouse in Vancouver offers a refreshing take on the traditional steakhouse, blending a chic, contemporary ambiance with a heartfelt homage to classic grilling techniques. Located in the vibrant Yaletown neighbourhood, Elisa stands out with its striking architecture and stylish, warm interior featuring an open kitchen and a wood-fired grill, which is the heart of their culinary operation. The menu showcases a thoughtful selection of prime cuts from the best local and international suppliers, ranging from Canadian- and US Prime beef to offerings like Japanese Wagyu, each grilled over sustainably sourced wood that imparts a unique, smoky flavour. A must-try is the Black Angus bone-in ribeye from Alberta, which is cooked to perfection, offering a sublime mix of texture and taste that is both rich and refined. Elisa's dedication to quality extends to its seafood options, with the branzino and cavolo nero being a standout. Side dishes, such as the triple fried chips and crispy hashbrowns, are executed with the same level of perfection, featuring a balance of flavours that perfectly complements the main dishes. The wine list is impressively comprehensive, featuring both local British Columbia wines and international selections, curated to enhance the flavours of the steaks and sides. The knowledgeable staff are skilled at pairing, enhancing the dining experience with their expert recommendations. Service at Elisa is exceptional, with a team that demonstrates both professionalism and a genuine passion for hospitality, ensuring every detail is attended to with care and every guest feels welcomed. Elisa is not just a steakhouse but a celebration of fine dining and the art of steak preparation. It’s a standout venue in Vancouver and beyond for those seeking an exceptional meal in a sophisticated yet comfortable setting, making it a top choice for culinary enthusiasts.

restaurants.name: NIKU STEAKHOUSE
restaurants.notes: Niku Steakhouse in San Francisco redefines the steakhouse experience with a distinctive blend of Japanese craftsmanship and classic American flair. Situated in the trendy Design District, Niku boasts a sleek, modern interior that features an open kitchen, allowing diners to witness the precision and artistry that goes into preparing each dish. The menu at Niku is a testament to the high caliber of its offerings, with a focus on Wagyu beef from Japan, Australia and local sources. The dry-aged New York strip from Flannery or the Australian Westholme short rib are particularly outstanding, delivering an unmatched richness and buttery texture that dissolves effortlessly on the palate. Side dishes at Niku are crafted to complement the mains without overshadowing them. The green asparagus and the dungeness crab rice are both excellent choices, offering a unique twist on traditional steakhouse sides. The beverage program is as meticulously curated as the food menu, with a wide selection of Japanese whiskeys and sakes, alongside a robust list of local and international wines. The knowledgeable staff are adept at guiding diners through the list to find the perfect drink pairing for their meal. Service at Niku is impeccable. Staff members are attentive, knowledgeable, and genuinely enthusiastic about their craft, contributing greatly to the overall dining experience. In conclusion, Niku Steakhouse stands out not just in San Francisco but as a culinary destination globally. It offers an unrivaled dining experience where every detail is considered, from the sourcing of the meat to the presentation and service, making it a must-visit for anyone seeking the ultimate steakhouse experience.

restaurants.name: BEEFBAR
restaurants.notes: The all new beefbar in New York stands out as a culinary beacon for meat lovers, delivering a high-end dining experience that focuses on prime cuts from around the world. Located in bustling Tribeca, this restaurant blends a modern aesthetic with a comfortable, inviting atmosphere, making it ideal for both casual lunches and elegant dinners. The interior design of beefbar by Humbert & Poyet is a perfect balance of luxury and functionality, featuring clean lines, luxurious materials, and subtle lighting that enhances the sophisticated ambiance. The overall environment is tailored to put the emphasis on the dining experience, ensuring that every meal is memorable. Service at beefbar is impeccable. The staff is not only attentive and prompt but also knowledgeable about the intricacies of different meats and their best preparations. Their guidance is invaluable, especially when navigating the extensive menu and selecting a perfect wine pairing from their well-curated list. The menu at Beefbar is centred around premium beef from exclusive sources, including US Black Angus, Kobe beef and American Wagyu. Each dish is prepared with a focus on highlighting the natural flavours and quality of the meat. Standouts include the 45 days dry-aged Porterhouse and the steak frites with the famous Relais de Paris sauce, which are a must-try. The sides, such as truffle mashed potatoes and charred Brussel sprouts, are equally impressive and complement the mains beautifully. beefbar also offers a selection of creative appetisers and decadent desserts, rounding out the dining experience with innovation and flair. beefbar in New York is a top destination for anyone seeking a remarkable dining experience. With its focus on exceptional meats, luxurious setting, and top-tier service, it promises an indulgent and satisfying culinary adventure.

restaurants.name: CAPA
restaurants.notes: Capa in Copenhagen offers a refreshing take on modern European cuisine, bringing a fusion of flavours and inventive dishes to the vibrant dining scene of the city. Located in a trendy area, the restaurant presents a minimalist, yet cozy ambiance, perfect for a refined culinary adventure. Upon entering Capa, guests are welcomed into a sleek and stylish setting characterised by its modern Scandinavian design—clean lines, natural materials, and a neutral color palette. This unassuming elegance is the perfect backdrop for the colourful and artistically plated dishes that follow. The service at Capa is exceptional, marked by attentiveness and a friendly demeanour. Staff are well-versed in the menu's offerings and eager to provide recommendations, ensuring a personalised dining experience for each guest. Capa’s menu is a testament to creativity and the use of high-quality ingredients like the finest dry-aged steak cuts from Sashi beef including the 40 day butter-aged Sashi ribeye. It also features a variety of small plates that encourage sharing and conversation. Standout dishes include the deep fried scallop with Iberico ham and Wagyu tartar with wasabi, ponzu and spring onions. Each dish is a blend of textures and flavours, thoughtfully assembled to delight the senses. Desserts at Capa continue the theme of innovation, with options like the lemon verbena providing a unique finish to the dining experience. Their knowledge of the wine pairings enhances the meal, allowing flavours to be fully appreciated. Overall, Capa is a culinary gem in Copenhagen that offers a dining experience filled with discovery and enjoyment. Its blend of exceptional food, elegant atmosphere, and impeccable service makes it a must-visit for locals and international gourmets alike, promising an evening of delightful surprises.

restaurants.name: THE GIDLEY
restaurants.notes: The Gidley in Sydney offers a unique dining escapade that transports you straight to the heart of luxurious, old-world steakhouse charm. Nestled conveniently in the bustling central business district, this restaurant combines the classic and the contemporary with its rich, dark wood interiors and plush leather booths, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere reminiscent of a grandiose gentlemen's club. At the core of The Gidley’s appeal is its exceptional steak selection. The standout has to be the Riverine Black Angus ribeye, which is expertly cooked to a perfect medium-rare, offering a melt-in-your-mouth texture and a deeply satisfying, robust flavour. This steak, like others on the menu, is beautifully charred on the outside, locking in all the juicy tenderness inside. Accompanying the steaks is an array of sides that are anything but ordinary. The creamed spinach and hand-cut fries are particularly commendable, each dish prepared with a twist that enhances the main course. For the adventurous, the bone marrow and truffle jus is a rich, flavourful addition that shouldn't be missed. The wine list at The Gidley is extensive, featuring an impressive selection of Australian and old world wines that complement the rich flavours of the menu superbly. The knowledgeable staff are eager to assist with pairing suggestions, enriching the dining experience. Service at The Gidley is top-notch, with staff members who are not only attentive and efficient but also genuinely passionate about offering a memorable dining experience. The Gidley is a treasure in Sydney's dining scene, perfect for those seeking a sophisticated yet comforting meal. It’s a standout for its prime steaks, elegant setting, and impeccable service, making it an essential destination for both locals and visitors alike.

restaurants.name: JEFFREY’S
restaurants.notes: Jeffrey's restaurant in Austin stands as a beacon of fine dining, offering an exquisite blend of ambiance, service, and culinary excellence. Located in the charming Clarksville neighbourhood, this establishment provides an upscale experience that's both sophisticated and inviting, featuring plush seating and soft lighting that sets a luxurious tone. The cuisine at Jeffrey's is exceptional, with a focus on contemporary American dishes crafted with precision and flair. A highlight dining experience was the braised beef short rib with roasted sunchokes and the Mishima Reserve American Wagyu ribeye—a true revelation in taste and texture. The ribeye was perfectly cooked to a succulent medium-rare and accompanied by crispy Brussel spouts. The wine list is impressive, spanning a range of vintages from both well-known and boutique vineyards. The knowledgeable staff are adept at suggesting pairings that enhance both the meal and the overall dining experience, contributing to an atmosphere of refined hospitality. Service at Jeffrey's is as meticulous as it is warm. The staff are attentive and professional, providing a level of care that anticipates needs without ever feeling overbearing. This attentiveness ensures that each meal is seamless and every guest feels genuinely cared for. In conclusion, Jeffrey's is not just a restaurant; it's an experience. With its masterful dishes, stellar service, and elegant setting, it represents the pinnacle of what Austin's and America’s culinary scene has to offer. It's an ideal choice for special occasions or when you simply want to indulge in a memorable dining experience. Truly, Jeffrey's is a must-visit for those seeking culinary craftsmanship at its finest. More of Jeffrey’s in the US.

restaurants.name: PRIME STEAK CLUB
restaurants.notes: Prime Steak Club in Mexico City offers a sublime dining experience that stands out even in a city known for its vibrant food scene. Nestled next to iconic Angel de la Indepencia in a chic, contemporary setting, this restaurant specialises in premium steaks from around the world with a touch of local flair. The ambiance at Prime Steak Club is sophisticated yet welcoming, featuring sleek, modern decor with touches of elegance such as dark wood accents and soft, ambient lighting. This creates an atmosphere that is both stylish and comfortable, ideal for business meetings or intimate dinners. Service at Prime Steak Club is top-notch, with attentive and professional staff who are knowledgeable about the menu and adept at recommending the perfect wine pairings from their extensive list. The attention to detail in service enhances the overall dining experience, making guests feel truly special. The menu boasts an impressive selection of cuts, including USDA Prime, Japanese- and Australian Wagyu, and local favourites, all cooked to perfection by chef Gabo and his amazing team with precise techniques to enhance the natural flavours of the meat. The Black Angus Prime ribeye and Australian 8+ Carrara are particularly outstanding, known for their texture and rich flavours. Starters such as chicharrón de pulpo and ribeteadas de New York, complement the steaks beautifully, while the sides, including the tiradito de kampachi y pulpo, set the stage for a memorable meal. Desserts are not to be overlooked, with classic options like tarta de queso de Madrid and rich chocolate cake providing a sweet finish to the dining experience. Prime Steak Club in Mexico City is a must-visit for steak lovers and those looking for a refined culinary experience in a trendy setting. It offers a blend of exceptional food, elegant ambiance, and impeccable service that guarantees a memorable evening out.

restaurants.name: DORIAN
restaurants.notes: Dorian in Notting Hill, London, encapsulates a vibrant dining atmosphere complemented by its chic and cozy setting. This restaurant, under the expert guidance of head chef Max Coen, brings a sophisticated British menu that excels in seasonal finesse and ingredient-driven dishes.The restaurant space is intimate and somewhat cramped what creates a lively buzz that's emblematic of Notting Hill’s dining scene. The décor features emerald banquette seating, a marble bar, and gold lamps, setting a glamorous stage where the fashionably dressed clientele come not just to dine but to be seen. Dorian’s culinary offerings with highlights including a perfect cross breed of Holstein Dairy cow X Japanese Black Beef cow, reared in North Yorkshire or langoustines from the Hebridean islands as well as dry hand-plucked game provided by Lake District Farmers are very convincing. Each dish showcases the kitchen’s commitment to quality, excellence and flavour, sourcing ingredients from suppliers like the Notting Hill „Meat“ Shop who dry-ages and refines the meat for Dorian. The wine list at Dorian is extensive, featuring everything from approachable labels to sought after vintages, catering to a wide range of tastes and budgets. The service can occasionally appear overly confident, which may detract from the otherwise stellar dining experience at Dorian. Dorian is particularly recommended for those seeking a stylish meal in a bustling setting, where the experience is as much about the ambiance and the company as it is about the food.

restaurants.name: ARAGAWA
restaurants.notes: Aragawa in London a new entry in our list offers a sophisticated dining experience that uniquely combines Japanese culinary artistry with the vibrant gastronomy scene of the city. Located in elegant Mayfair, this restaurant is renowned for its exclusive focus on high-quality Wagyu beef, presenting a dining concept centred around simplicity and excellence. The ambiance of Aragawa is minimalist yet warm, with subtle Japanese aesthetic touches that create a tranquil, upscale environment. The restaurant's intimate setting is designed to enhance the culinary journey, making it ideal for special occasions or business dinners where every detail is curated to provide an exceptional experience. Service at Aragawa is impeccable. Staff are knowledgeable and attentive, ensuring that each guest feels well attended to. Their expertise particularly shines when explaining the origins of the dishes and the best ways to enjoy them, which adds an educational dimension to the dining experience. The menu, though concise, is crafted to showcase the supreme quality of Wagyu beef. Each cut is selected for its flavour and marbling, and cooked to perfection to highlight its distinctive characteristics. The simplicity of the seasoning allows the natural flavours of the meat to stand out, complemented by a selection of side dishes that are equally thoughtful and well-executed. Aragawa also offers a carefully selected range of sake and wine, which pairs beautifully with the menu and enhances the flavours of the Wagyu beef. Aragawa in London is a testament to the art of Japanese cuisine with a focus on luxury and quality. It is essential for those who value the subtle nuances of dining and are seeking an unforgettable meal featuring the finest Wagyu beef.

restaurants.name: LA BRASERIA
restaurants.notes: La Braseria in Osio Sotto, Italy, is a charming restaurant that offers a truly Italian dining experience, particularly praised for its authentic grilled meats and homestyle dishes. Nestled in the heart of the town, this eatery provides a warm, welcoming atmosphere that feels both traditional and inviting. Upon arrival, diners are greeted by the rustic charm of the decor, featuring exposed brick walls and wooden beams that create a cozy, old-world ambiance. The service at La Braseria is notably professional, friendly and attentive, with staff members who are passionate about their cuisine and eager to make recommendations about the dishes and wines on offer. The menu at La Braseria focuses on uncompromised quality and flavours of classic Italian grill fare. The grilled steak cuts are the centrepiece—perfectly aged to the peak, expertly cooked, and bursting with flavour. From succulent benchmark steak cuts to tenderly grilled seasonal vegetables, each dish showcases the quality of local ingredients. The pasta dishes especially the tortelli di mandorle amare con tartufo nero bergamasco, another highlight, are made with handmade pasta and rich, savory sauces that are a testament to authentic Italian cooking. One of the restaurant’s standout features is its commitment to sustainability and tradition, evident in every dish served. The wine list complements the menu beautifully, featuring a selection of the finest local Italian wines that enhance the dining experience. In conclusion, La Braseria in Osio Sotto is a must-visit for anyone looking for a taste of genuine Italian cuisine served in a setting that feels like a slice of Italy.

restaurants.name: BEEF & GLORY
restaurants.notes: beef & glory in Vienna offers an outstanding experience for any meat lover, making it a standout destination in the city's culinary scene. Situated in a cozy yet stylish setting, this restaurant specialises in steaks, with a particular emphasis on premium dry-aged beef, which is a treat for all carnivores. Upon entering, guests are welcomed into a warm and inviting atmosphere. The decor is elegantly rustic with a modern twist, featuring rich wooden furnishings and soft lighting that creates an intimate dining environment. The service at Beef & Glory is impeccable; staff are knowledgeable and eager to offer recommendations, adding to the overall delightful dining experience. The menu is a celebration of high-quality meats, with the dry-aged steaks being the undeniable stars. Each dish is cooked to perfection and presented with flair. Side dishes, though seemingly simple, are executed with an attention to detail that complements the mains beautifully. The restaurant also offers a selection of fine wines that pair excellently with the rich flavours of the beef. One of the highlights of beef & glory is their commitment to quality, evident in the sourcing of their ingredients. The beef is not only top-notch but also ethically sourced, which is appreciated by the environmentally conscious diner. Beef & Glory in Vienna is more than just a steakhouse; it's a culinary experience that celebrates the art of meat preparation. It’s an ideal spot for both special occasions and casual dinners for those who appreciate fine dining and some of the finest steak cuts served in the German speaking countries. Whether you're a local or a tourist, a meal here promises to be memorable.

restaurants.name: GILLIS
restaurants.notes: Gillis in Ghent is a culinary treasure and our highest climber nestled in the heart of Belgium's vibrant food scene. Situated close to the charming city center, this restaurant offers a modern interpretation of traditional Flemish cuisine, celebrating the region's rich culinary heritage with a creative twist. The ambiance at Gillis is elegant and inviting, with stylish decor that combines sleek contemporary elements with rustic charm. The space exudes warmth and sophistication, creating an intimate setting that is perfect for a romantic dinner or a gathering with friends. The sharing menu at Gillis is a testament to the chef's dedication to radical quality, featuring a range of meat dishes and steak cuts from the best purveyors in Europe and beyond that showcase the best of Belgian and European cuisine. Highlights include the hand-cut Holstein beef tartare, the slow-cooked to perfection and bursting with rich, savoury flavours pork belly from local Duroc, and the homemade pork cheek croquettes, served with a Belgian pickle mayonnaise. The wine list at Gillis selected by chef-owner Bram Candries is equally impressive, featuring a portfolio of some of the finest positions the old wine word has to offer that perfectly complement the bold flavours of the cuisine. The sommelier is on hand to provide expert recommendations, ensuring that each guest finds the perfect pairing for their meal. Service at Gillis is professional and friendly helmed by Bram’s wife Jozefien, with staff who are passionate about providing guests with a memorable dining experience. Whether you're a local looking for a taste of home or a visitor eager to explore the flavours of Flanders, Gillis is a must-visit destination when in Ghent and beyond.

restaurants.name: HOLSTEINS
restaurants.notes: Holsteins in Monterrey, Mexico, is a must-visit destination for steak enthusiasts who appreciate a global perspective on beef. The restaurant prides itself on its vast expertise in steaks from around the world, offering a menu that showcases premium cuts from renowned cattle-raising regions including the United States, Japan and Australia. The interior of Holsteins is elegant, providing a warm and inviting atmosphere that complements the serious steakhouse vibe. The staff is well-versed in the nuances of the various cuts and origins of the meat, providing diners with valuable insights that enhance the overall experience. What truly sets Holsteins apart is its dedication to quality and the art of steak preparation. The restaurant employs traditional and contemporary techniques to highlight the unique characteristics of each type of steak. The US ribeye, for example, is masterfully grilled to emphasise its rich flavour and tender texture, while the Australian Wagyu is treated with a precise cooking method that maximises its marbled succulence. Additionally, Holsteins' commitment to a holistic dining experience is evident in its side dishes and accompaniments, which are thoughtfully designed to complement the flavours of the steaks. The cocktail and wine list is equally impressive, featuring selections that pair beautifully with the bold flavours of the beef. For carnivores searching for a top-notch steak experience in Monterrey and beyond, Holsteins offers a distinctive and satisfying dining experience that spans the globe. Whether you're a local or a visitor, this restaurant provides not just a meal, but a comprehensive journey through the world of high-quality beef.

restaurants.name: TRIBUTO
restaurants.notes: Tributo in Quito is a culinary gem that pays homage to Ecuadorian gastronomy while offering a contemporary twist on traditional dishes. This restaurant exudes charm and sophistication, inviting diners on a journey through Ecuador's diverse culinary landscape. It’s about Fuego and Origen. The ambiance at Tributo is both elegant and inviting, with stylish decor featuring warm wood accents, soft lighting, and subtle nods to Ecuadorian culture. The space strikes a perfect balance between modern chic and rustic charm, creating a welcoming atmosphere that is ideal for both intimate dinners and celebratory gatherings. The menu at Tributo features a range from nose to tail dining, highlighting the rich flavors and ingredients of Ecuador, with an emphasis on locally sourced meats from the Andes Mountains and sustainable seafood. Among the finest meats Ecuador offers is the exceptional Txuletón de Vaca, a 120-day dry-aged beef from an old cow raised 4,000 meters above sea level in the Andes, outside Quito. The on-site aged charcuterie is particularly notable. Other standouts include "sancocho de la abuela Rosa," a 48-hour smoked rib broth with a deep umami taste, and the tostada de lengua ahumada, a dish featuring smoked cow tongue. In addition to its savoury offerings, Tributo also boasts an impressive selection of cocktails inspired by Ecuadorian ingredients and flavours. The bartenders are skilled at crafting creative concoctions that perfectly complement the cuisine, making for a truly immersive dining experience. Service at Tributo is attentive and friendly, with staff who are passionate about Ecuadorian cuisine and eager to share their knowledge with diners. The sommelier is on hand to provide expert recommendations from the restaurant's curated wine list, which features a variety of local and international vintages. Tributo is a must-visit destination for food enthusiasts looking to explore the diverse flavours of Ecuador in a stylish and welcoming setting. With its inventive cuisine, creative cocktails, and attentive service, it promises a dining experience that is impressive and memorable.

restaurants.name: AMERICAN CUT
restaurants.notes: American Cut in New York City is a premier steakhouse that offers a sophisticated dining experience infused with modern flair. Situated in the bustling Tribeca neighbourhood, this upscale restaurant captivates diners with its sleek ambiance, inventive cuisine, and impeccable service. The ambiance at American Cut is refined yet inviting, with contemporary décor featuring dark wood accents, plush leather banquettes, and stylish lighting that creates an intimate and upscale atmosphere. The space exudes an air of sophistication, making it an ideal setting for a special occasion or a memorable night out. The menu at American Cut showcases a creative twist on classic steakhouse fare, with a focus on premium cuts of beef and innovative appetisers and sides. The steaks, sourced from top-quality producers and aged to perfection, are the stars of the show. From the richly marbled bone-in ribeye to the tender Miyazaki Wagyu, each cut is expertly cooked to order and bursting with flavour. In addition to its exceptional steaks, American Cut offers a variety of enticing appetisers and sides that elevate the dining experience. Highlights include the indulgent tuna tar tot, the market ceviche, and the bone marrow & escargot.. Service at American Cut is exemplary, with a knowledgeable and attentive staff that caters to every need. The sommelier is on hand to provide expert recommendations from the extensive cocktail- and wine list, which features a curated selection of domestic and international wines, perfectly complementing the rich flavours of the cuisine. With its sophisticated ambiance, inventive cuisine, and exceptional service, it promises a memorable dining experience that is sure to delight even the most discerning palates.

restaurants.name: ANAHI
restaurants.notes: Anahi, nestled in the heart of Paris' trendy Marais district, is a charming and intimate restaurant that offers a unique dining experience, blending Argentine flavours with a classic Parisian ambiance. This former butcher shop, with its distinctive white-tiled walls and Art Deco details, has been transformed into a chic eatery where the old-world charm is palpable. Upon entering Anahi, diners are struck by the atmosphere, which retains a nostalgic elegance with its original ceramic tiles and the shimmering warmth of candlelight. The space is small yet inviting, creating an intimate setting that feels both exclusive and welcoming. The menu at Anahi is a celebration of Argentine cuisine curated by Mauro Colagreco and Riccardo Giraudi, focusing on high-quality meats and traditional South American dishes. The highlight is undoubtedly the selection of grilled meats, including succulent entrañas and bife ancho that are cooked to perfection. These prime cuts are complemented by a variety of sides that embody the robust flavours of Argentina, such as a perfect chimichurri, patatas bravas, and grilled asparagus. Apart from the steaks, Anahi offers an array of other dishes, like empanadas and ceviche, each prepared with an attention to authenticity and flavour. The wine list is thoughtfully curated, featuring a selection of Argentine wines that beautifully pair with the rich and hearty dishes. Service at Anahi is both friendly and professional. The staff are passionate about Argentine cuisine and eager to share their knowledge, making recommendations that enhance the dining experience. Anahi is a culinary gem, set against the backdrop of Parisian elegance. It's a perfect choice for those looking to savour distinctive flavours in a setting that exudes character and charm

restaurants.name: FOGÓN
restaurants.notes: Fogón in Buenos Aires is a hidden culinary gem that invites diners on a journey through the diverse and vibrant flavours of Argentine cuisine. Tucked away in the charming neighbourhood of Palermo, this restaurant offers a warm and inviting ambiance, paired with exceptional food and attentive service. The atmosphere at Fogón is cozy and intimate, with welcoming decor and soft lighting that create a relaxed and welcoming setting. The restaurant's focal point is the open kitchen, where flames dance atop the grill, infusing the air with tantalising aromas that promise a memorable dining experience. The menu at Fogón celebrates the best of Argentine cuisine, with a focus on grilled meats and traditional dishes prepared with a contemporary twist. The star of the show is the Asado, a traditional Argentine barbecue, featuring an array of succulent meats cooked to perfection over an open flame. From tender slow braised Asado to flavourful smoked ribeye cap, each cut is expertly seasoned and grilled to bring out its natural flavours. In addition to the Asado, Fogón offers a variety of other dishes that showcase the culinary diversity of Argentina. The „El Matrimonio“ de chorizo y morcilla, are a perfect part of the tasting menu, while the grilled provoleta cheese, served with grilled fruits and a Torrontés wine reduction, is another delightful dish. The service at Fogón is warm and attentive, with staff who are knowledgeable about the menu and eager to make recommendations. The wine list features a selection of Argentine wines, perfectly suited to complement the bold flavours of the cuisine. Fogón offers a delicious and authentic dining experience that captures the essence of Argentine cuisine. Whether you're a local looking for a taste of home or a visitor eager to explore the flavours of Buenos Aires, Fogón is a must-visit destination.

restaurants.name: BIFRÒ
restaurants.notes: Bifrò in Turin is a delightful culinary gem tucked away in the heart of the city, offering a contemporary journey of flavours and produce of highest quality from around the world. This restaurant stands out for its innovative dishes, warm ambiance, and commitment to showcasing the rich flavours of the region. The ambiance at Bifrò is chic and inviting, with a modern design that features sleek furnishings, soft lighting, and artistic touches that create an intimate and welcoming atmosphere. The space is tastefully decorated, striking a balance between elegance and comfort, making it the perfect setting for a private dinner or a gathering with friends. The menu at Bifrò is a celebration of the best meat from around the world, with a focus on fresh, locally sourced ingredients and quality at its core. Standout dishes are the perfectly cooked steak cuts from chef-owner Roberto Pintadu and his team over an open fire grill. Each dish is beautifully presented and expertly prepared, showcasing the culinary skill and creativity of the kitchen. Service at Bifrò is attentive and friendly, with staff who are passionate about the cuisine and eager to provide recommendations and ensure a memorable dining experience. Bifrò also offers an excellent wine list, which has been curated by experienced and leading Italian sommeliers who will be pleased to advise you on new finds and much more. Bifrò offers a modern and sophisticated take on Italian grill cuisine.

restaurants.name: BISTECCA
restaurants.notes: Bistecca Tuscan Steakhouse in Singapore is a celebrated dining destination that offers a delightful blend of rustic Italian charm and sophisticated steakhouse fare. Located along the vibrant Mohamed Sultan Road, this intimate and elegantly appointed restaurant specialises in authentic Tuscan cuisine, with a particular focus on beautifully prepared steaks. Upon entering Bistecca, guests are greeted by a cozy, warmly-lit ambiance reminiscent of a traditional Tuscan villa. The decor features rich wood paneling, plush leather seating, and vintage Italian artwork, creating an inviting atmosphere that is both luxurious and comforting. The culinary centrepiece at Bistecca is the Fiorentina – a thick cut of T-bone steak that is expertly grilled over a wood-fired flame to achieve a perfect char on the outside while remaining succulently tender inside. Another signature dish is made from F1 Gippsland Australian Wagyu, which provides a marbled texture and deep, complex flavours. Each steak is large enough to share, making it a perfect choice for groups or a romantic dinner for two. In addition to its famous steaks, Bistecca offers a variety of traditional Italian dishes, including handmade pasta and risotto, and a selection of antipasti that highlight the quality of local and imported ingredients. The burrata with chitose cherry tomatoes is a refreshing starter, and the roasted garlic potato purée are a must-try side dish. Service at Bistecca is impeccable, with attentive and knowledgeable staff who enhance the dining experience with their thoughtful recommendations and attentive care. The wine list is impressively curated, featuring a selection of Italian and international wines that perfectly complement the rich flavours of the menu. Bistecca Tuscan Steakhouse in Singapore is a must-visit for anyone looking to indulge in high-quality Tuscan cooking and some of the best steaks the city has to offer, all served in a truly enchanting setting.

restaurants.name: BAZAAR MEAT
restaurants.notes: Bazaar Meat in Chicago is a culinary spectacle, where the imaginative mind of Chef José Andrés brings forth a daring and innovative approach to the steakhouse concept. Situated in the vibrant River North neighbourhood, this restaurant stands out for its lavish décor and theatrical presentation, all of which complement the exceptional dining experience. The interior of Bazaar Meat is a feast for the eyes, featuring a bold, eclectic design that blends luxury with whimsy. The space is divided into various dining areas, each with its own unique character, from the leather banquettes and rich draperies to the striking bar area, which is a central hub of activity. The dramatic, open kitchen acts as a stage where chefs perform culinary artistry, engaging diners with their craft. The menu at Bazaar Meat is a tribute to all things carnivorous, with a wide range of meats prepared through innovative techniques. Highlights include the suckling pig with a crisp, caramelised exterior and tender interior, and the Wagyu beef sliders, which are small in size but huge in flavour. The restaurant also offers a selection of inventive small plates, such as the foie gras cotton candy, which combines playful presentation with rich, decadent taste. The service at Bazaar Meat is friendly. Staff are attentive, knowledgeable, and eager to guide diners through the extensive menu, offering recommendations on everything from food pairings to the perfect wine from their comprehensive list. Bazaar Meat is an exploration of the senses, with each dish designed to challenge and delight. It's an ideal spot for those looking to indulge in a luxurious meal that combines traditional elements with unexpected twists, all within the heart of Chicago.

restaurants.name: KEENS
restaurants.notes: Keens Steakhouse in New York is an iconic dining establishment that embodies the rich history and culinary tradition of Manhattan. Located just a stone's throw from Herald Square, Keens has been a beloved fixture in the city since 1885, offering a nostalgic journey back to the days of old New York with its classic décor and legendary cuisine. Upon entering Keens, diners are transported to another era, surrounded by dark wood paneling, antique furnishings, and an extensive collection of churchwarden pipes that line the ceilings—a unique feature and nod to the restaurant's historic past. The atmosphere is one of timeless elegance and warmth, making it a favourite for both New Yorkers and visitors from around the world. Keens is renowned for its exceptional steak offerings, particularly the mutton chop, which has been a signature dish since the restaurant's early days. This old-world specialty is matched by a selection of prime, dry-aged steaks that are expertly grilled to perfection, from the succulent porterhouse to the richly flavourful T-bone. Each cut is sourced from high-quality producers and showcases the skill and tradition that Keens brings to its steaks. Beyond steaks, Keens offers a variety of classic American dishes, including seafood entrées like the Maryland crab cakes and lobster bisque, each prepared with the same attention to quality and taste. The side dishes, such as baked Idaho and hand-cut fries, are perfect accompaniments to the robust flavours of the meats. Service at Keens is as noteworthy as its food, characterised by a professional and attentive staff that enhances the dining experience with knowledgeable recommendations and timely service. Keens Steakhouse is a celebration of New York's culinary heritage, offering a dining experience that is both deliciously satisfying and steeped in historical charm.

restaurants.name: BEAST
restaurants.notes: Beast in London is an exceptional dining venue renowned for its dramatic approach to surf and turf. Nestled in the bustling area of Marylebone, this restaurant captivates with its cavernous, Nordic-inspired interior and an impressive communal dining experience that emphasises shared enjoyment. The ambiance at Beast is both unique and immersive. Diners are seated at long, communal oak tables that foster a convivial atmosphere, encouraging interaction and conversation. The decor features rustic wooden beams and chains with large crab and lobster traps hanging from the ceiling, enhancing the thematic experience of dining in a grand Viking hall. This setting, combined with mood lighting, creates an intriguingly intimate yet bold dining environment. Beast’s menu showcases a simple yet exquisite selection focused on premium King Crab and the finest beef from around the world. The crab, imported directly from the cold waters of Norway, is celebrated for its sweet, succulent meat and is served simply steamed to highlight its natural flavours. The beef, sourced from various renowned producers from the Lake District, Australia, USA and Japan, is perfectly aged and grilled, offering cuts that are rich in flavour and impeccably tender. Each meal is intended to be enjoyed family-style, with dishes served centrally so guests can share. The sides, including truffle chips and cauliflower carpaccio, complement the mains beautifully, adding depth and variety to the feast. The service at Beast mirrors the quality of its food—attentive, knowledgeable, and enthusiastic. The staff excel in making recommendations from the impressive wine list, which features robust reds and crisp whites, carefully chosen to enhance the flavours of the crab and beef. Beast is a dining spectacle that offers a unique blend of luxury, adventure, and warmth.

restaurants.name: KLAW
restaurants.notes: Klaw in Miami is a standout steak restaurant and seafood destination, bringing a fresh and elevated dining experience to the Edgewater neighbourhood. With its stunning views of Biscayne Bay and a stylish, nautical-inspired interior, Klaw offers a sophisticated atmosphere that complements its innovative menu. The design of Klaw is a blend of modern elegance and maritime charm, featuring deep blue hues, warm wood accents, and plush seating. Large windows frame the beautiful waterfront, allowing natural light to enhance the bright and airy space. This setting is perfect for a lavish night out, a special occasion, or a business meeting. The menu at Klaw is focused on premium steak cuts and seafood, with a commitment to freshness and quality. Highlights include the King Crab, brought in from the waters of the Arctic, and the in-house dry-aged prime steaks that are expertly cooked over open fire to bring out rich, nuanced flavours. Premium cuts from Nebraska, American Wagyu, rare „Braunvieh“ from NC as well as Tajima Wagyu from Japan are particularly popular among the guests. Appetisers such as the east coast oysters with leche de tigre and the caviar service set a high standard for the following courses, showcasing exceptional ingredients and preparation. The desserts, like flourless chocolate cake or the Basque cheesecake, are thoughtfully designed to finish the dining experience.. The beverage program at Klaw is impressive, featuring a carefully selected wine list that pairs perfectly with the menu’s offerings, as well as a variety of signature cocktails that capture the essence of Miami’s vibrant culture. Service at Klaw is attentive and professional. The staff are well-informed and eager to assist in making recommendations, ensuring that each guest’s dining experience is both enjoyable and memorable. Klaw is a must-visit for those in Miami looking to indulge in high-quality seafood and steaks, all served in a breathtakingly beautiful and welcoming environment.

restaurants.name: TRATTORIA DALL’OSTE
restaurants.notes: Trattoria dall'Oste in Florence is a culinary gem nestled in the heart of Tuscany's gastronomic paradise. From the moment you step inside, you're enveloped in a warm, rustic ambiance that sets the stage for an unforgettable dining experience. The menu at Trattoria dall'Oste is a celebration of traditional Tuscan cuisine, expertly crafted with locally sourced ingredients. Their focus on quality shines through in every dish, from the tender Bistecca alla Fiorentina to the handmade pasta dishes bursting with flavour. Each bite is a testament to the chef's dedication to preserving the authenticity of Italian cuisine while adding their own creative flair.
