Entrecôte's menu is a delightful ode to French culinary traditions, with the signature dish being the "Steak Frites" — a perfectly cooked steak cut (270 days grain-fed Australian Angus beef) served with a secret herb butter sauce and unlimited crispy fries. This dish, simple yet wonderfully executed, encapsulates the restaurant’s commitment to quality and flavour. The menu also offers a variety of other French classics, such as the delicate Salmon Tartare, the rich and creamy Onion Soup, and the light and crisp Salade Niçoise. Each dish is prepared with meticulous care, using fresh, high-quality ingredients that bring authentic French tastes to the forefront. Desserts at Entrecôte are not to be missed. The Profiteroles and Crème Brûlée are particularly exquisite, offering a sweet finish to a delightful meal. Service at Entrecôte mirrors the quality found in its dishes — attentive, friendly, and efficient, ensuring a pleasant dining experience from start to finish. Overall, Restaurant Entrecôte in Melbourne successfully transports its diners to the heart of Paris through its ambiance, service, and culinary offerings. It's a must-visit for anyone craving a taste of France in the Australian culinary landscape.

restaurants.name: DSTRIKT
restaurants.notes: Dstrikt Steakhouse, located in the luxurious Ritz-Carlton Hotel in Vienna, offers an upscale dining experience that celebrates the finest Austrian beef and local produce. Known for its sophisticated ambiance and exceptional service, Dstrikt provides a culinary journey that is both authentic and memorable. Upon entering Dstrikt, guests are welcomed into an elegantly designed space that blends classic Viennese charm with modern elegance. The restaurant's warm, inviting atmosphere is complemented by plush seating and soft lighting, creating the perfect setting for a romantic dinner or a formal business meeting. The menu at Dstrikt Steakhouse showcases a commitment to quality and local sourcing, with premium cuts of beef such as the Austrian dry-aged T-bone, Japanese A5 Wagyu and the classic ribeye from Austria taking center stage. These expertly grilled steaks are accompanied by a selection of traditional side dishes, including Josper grilled vegetables and crisp Bratkartoffeln (fried potatoes), each adding a touch of local flavour. In addition to steaks, Dstrikt offers a variety of other dishes that highlight the best of Austrian cuisine, such as the Wiener Schnitzel made from tender veal. The seafood options, like the grilled octopus, are also a testament to the kitchen's high standards. Service at Dstrikt is routined. The staff are attentive, ensuring that every detail is perfect from the moment guests arrive. The sommelier is particularly knowledgeable, recommending wine pairings from an extensive list that enhances the flavours of the dishes beautifully.

restaurants.name: VUUR
restaurants.notes: VUUR Restaurant in Remhoogte, South Africa, offers a remarkable dining experience that seamlessly blends the essence of South African culinary traditions with contemporary flair. Located amidst the picturesque landscape of a vibrant wine estate, VUUR presents an enchanting backdrop for an exquisite meal. The restaurant's name, meaning "fire" in Afrikaans, hints at the central role that flame cooking plays in its kitchen. This technique is masterfully employed to enhance the natural flavours of high-quality local ingredients, resulting in dishes that are both bold and refined. The menu at VUUR is a celebration of South African gastronomy, featuring a variety of meats, seafood, and vegetarian options, all infused with local herbs and spices that tell the story of the region's rich culinary heritage. The architecture and interior design of VUUR complement its natural surroundings, featuring earthy tones and rustic elements that create a warm and inviting atmosphere. Large windows offer panoramic views of the estate, allowing diners to enjoy the stunning scenery while savouring their meals. Service at VUUR is impeccable. The staff are knowledgeable and attentive, contributing to a welcoming and relaxed dining experience. Their familiarity with the menu and the wine list ensures that every recommendation enhances the flavours of the selected dishes. In summary, VUUR Restaurant not only offers a menu rich with South African flavours but also provides a sensory experience through its stunning location and thoughtful service. It's a perfect spot for those who appreciate unique dining in a spectacular setting, making every visit a memorable occasion.

restaurants.name: KINGSLEYS
restaurants.notes: Waterfront Dining at its Finest: Kingsleys Woolloomooloo, Sydney Nestled along the historic Finger Wharf in Woolloomooloo, Kingsleys is a Sydney institution renowned for its superb steaks and spectacular waterfront views. This charming restaurant combines a relaxed, welcoming atmosphere with a culinary expertise that caters to both seafood lovers and of course steak enthusiasts. As you dine at Kingsleys, the picturesque setting enhances every meal—the sparkling waters and bustling wharf create a backdrop that’s both vibrant and serene. The interior boasts a rustic charm with exposed beams and nautical accents, reflecting the maritime heritage of its location. Kingsleys specialises in prime Australian beef, offering a variety of cuts from tenderloins to rib-eyes, each grilled to perfection with a focus on enhancing the natural flavours. Seafood is another highlight here, with fresh, locally-sourced options like the King prawns and the classic fish and chips. The sides, such as the creamy mashed potatoes and the fresh, zesty salads, are the perfect accompaniment to both the seafood and steak dishes. The service at Kingsleys is friendly and efficient. The staff are knowledgeable about the menu and eager to recommend both food and wine pairings. The wine list is comprehensive, featuring a mix of Australian favourites and international labels that complement the robust flavours of the dishes. Whether you’re there for a casual lunch or a celebratory dinner, Kingsleys offers a dining experience that is synonymous with the essence of Sydney—laid back yet sophisticated, with a focus on quality ingredients and memorable moments. Kingsleys Woolloomooloo is a standout choice for anyone seeking a quintessential Sydney dining experience by the water.

restaurants.name: BEEF
restaurants.notes: A Carnivore's Delight: Beef Restaurant, Geneva Beef Restaurant in Geneva offers a sophisticated dining experience dedicated to the art of meat preparation. Located in the heart of the city, this upscale eatery draws in both locals and international travellers with its sleek decor and an atmosphere. The interior of Beef Restaurant is minimalistic, with a touch of industrial chic that includes Metro tiled walls and soft, ambient lighting. The open kitchen adds an interactive element to the dining experience, as guests can watch the chefs expertly grill and carve their meals. The menu is a celebration of high-quality beef from around the world, including Swiss, Australian, Japanese and American cuts. Each steak is cooked with precision on a state-of-the-art grill that seals in flavours and tenderness. The Supreme beef from the Netherlands as well as the grain-fed chuck flap from Australia are a standout, known for its rich taste and character. Side dishes at Beef Restaurant complement the mains perfectly, with options like Polenta di Ticino and grilled vegetables, all seasoned to enhance the main course. Service is welcoming, with staff that are attentive without being intrusive. They are knowledgeable about the menu and adept at suggesting wine pairings from the appealing list that features both local and international options. Beef Restaurant is a must-visit for meat lovers in Geneva. It offers a refined yet relaxed atmosphere where diners can indulge in some of the best cuts of meat prepared with exceptional culinary skill.

restaurants.name: A FIGUEIRA RUBAIYAT
restaurants.notes: Under the Fig Tree: A Figueira Rubaiyat, São Paulo A Figueira Rubaiyat in São Paulo is a dining spectacle, uniquely centered around an enormous fig tree that stretches its branches across the restaurant's courtyard, creating a breathtaking natural canopy. This iconic setting, combined with the restaurant's commitment to fine food and service, makes for an unforgettable dining experience. Located in the upscale Jardins district, A Figueira Rubaiyat fuses the charm of its open-air ambiance with a menu that celebrates the best of Brazilian and Spanish cuisine. The restaurant is renowned for its expertly grilled meats, particularly the picanha, which is a local favourite due to its tender texture and rich flavour. Seafood dishes are also a staple here, with highlights including the fresh octopus a la plancha and the robust seafood rice, each prepared with precision and flair. The ingredients are always fresh, sourced from the Rubaiyat Group’s own farms, ensuring a farm-to-table experience that is tangible in every bite. The service at A Figueira Rubaiyat matches the quality of its dishes. Waitstaff are attentive and knowledgeable, offering recommendations that perfectly complement your choice of meal. The wine list is extensive, featuring a hand-picked selection of both Brazilian and international wines designed to enhance the flavours of the food. Dining at A Figueira Rubaiyat is not just about enjoying a meal; it’s about experiencing the harmony of nature and gastronomy in one of São Paulo’s most picturesque settings. Whether it’s a casual lunch or a special evening occasion, this restaurant offers a magical backdrop along with some of the finest foods in the city.

restaurants.name: THE MEAT CO.
restaurants.notes: Savour the Sizzle: The MeatCo. in Dubai Located in the vibrant Souk Al Bahar, with stunning views of the Burj Khalifa and Dubai Fountain, The MeatCo. is a top destination for carnivores in Dubai. This sophisticated steakhouse blends an African-themed ambiance with premium quality meats, creating a dining experience that’s both exotic and luxurious. As you step inside, you're greeted by a warm, inviting atmosphere featuring dark wood, leather accents, and African-inspired decor. The setting strikes a perfect balance between upscale dining and a comfortable, welcoming vibe, ideal for both romantic evenings and business dinners. The MeatCo. specialises in meticulously sourced cuts of meat, each selected for its quality and flavour. The menu offers a range of steaks from Japanese A5 Hokkaido Wagyu, Australian Wagyu to Australian Angus, all expertly cooked. Seafood lovers will also find delights such as grilled prawns, fresh oysters, and seared scallops ensuring there's something for every palate. The side dishes, like the creamy spinach, charred Brussel sprouts and hand-cut fries, complement the mains perfectly. Service at The MeatCo. is impeccable. The staff are knowledgeable about the nuances of each dish and adept at recommending the perfect wine pairings from their extensive list, enhancing the overall dining experience. The MeatCo. is a culinary adventure that offers a taste of Africa in the heart of Dubai. It’s an ideal spot for anyone looking to indulge in high-quality meats and a memorable dining experience.

restaurants.name: GRILL
restaurants.notes: Sophistication and Flavours: Grill at Hotel Vier Jahreszeiten, Hamburg Located within the esteemed Hotel Vier Jahreszeiten, the Grill restaurant epitomises culinary excellence and elegant dining in Hamburg. Known for its impeccable service and luxurious ambiance, this dining venue attracts both locals and visitors seeking a premier gastronomic experience. The restaurant’s decor is a perfect blend of historic charm and contemporary sophistication, with rich wood paneling, ornate chandeliers, and plush seating. Large windows offer breathtaking views of the Alster Lake, setting a serene backdrop for an unforgettable meal. Grill restaurant specialises in refined versions of classic dishes, with a particular emphasis on premium grilled meats and seafood. The menu is a testament to the chef’s commitment to quality and precision. Highlights include perfectly charred steaks from the US (USDA Prime), Scotland (Scottish Highland beef), and Australian Wagyu sourced from the leading producers and aged to enhance their natural flavours. The lobster Thermidor is another standout, offering a decadent taste of the sea. Each dish is paired with suggestions from an extensive wine list that features both renowned international labels and exceptional local vintages. The knowledgeable staff are adept at recommending pairings that elevate the dining experience, making each course a celebration of flavours. Service at the Grill is without fault. The staff are not only attentive but also discreet, ensuring a dining experience that is both personal and relaxed. Their professionalism reflects the high standards of the Hotel Vier Jahreszeiten itself. Grill restaurant at Hotel Vier Jahreszeiten is a journey through refined tastes and elegant surroundings, making it a must-visit destination for those who appreciate the finer things in life.

restaurants.name: GIMLET
restaurants.notes: Elegant and Inviting: Gimlet at Cavendish House, Melbourne Gimlet at Cavendish House in Melbourne offers a sophisticated dining experience that artfully blends the charm of a bygone era with contemporary culinary creativity. Situated in a beautifully restored 1920s building, Gimlet exudes a classic elegance, from its stunning Art Deco interiors to its refined cocktail bar that welcomes guests upon arrival. The ambiance is immediately captivating, featuring high ceilings, ornate details, and soft lighting that create a warm and inviting atmosphere. This setting makes Gimlet perfect for romantic evenings, business dinners, or special occasions. Chef Andrew McConnell's menu is a modern take on European classics, with each dish carefully crafted to highlight fresh, local ingredients. The menu is diverse, offering something for every palate, from exquisite Giaveri Beluga caviar, seafood dishes like the local rock oysters to succulent dry-aged Gippsland strip steak and O’Connor T-bone. Each plate is not only a delight to the taste buds but also a visual feast, presented with impeccable style. The cocktail program at Gimlet is equally impressive, featuring both innovative creations and timeless classics. The bartenders are true artisans, with a deep knowledge of mixology that ensures a perfect drink to complement your meal. Service at Gimlet is exemplary, with attentive and knowledgeable staff who enhance the dining experience with their professionalism and eagerness to assist. Gimlet is more than a destination. It promises an unforgettable culinary journey, making it a jewel in Melbourne's vibrant dining scene. Whether you're a local foodie or a visitor to the city, Gimlet is a must-visit for anyone seeking a taste of Melbourne's finest.

restaurants.name: TABERNA PEDRAZA
restaurants.notes: A Culinary Gem: Taberna Pedraza, Madrid Taberna Pedraza in Madrid is a celebration of Spanish culinary traditions, offering a genuine taste of local cuisine in a charming and authentic setting. Located in the vibrant Barrio de Salamanca, this cozy taberna is renowned for its dedication to classic Spanish dishes, crafted with impeccable attention to detail and the finest ingredients. The atmosphere in Taberna Pedraza is warmly inviting, with a rustic decor that features vintage furnishings and tiled walls, creating an ambiance that feels both traditional and welcoming. It's an ideal spot for both casual diners and food enthusiasts looking to immerse themselves in the true spirit of Madrid. The menu is a showcase of regional specialties. Standouts include their signature "Cocido Madrileño," a hearty, flavourful stew that is a staple of Madrid's cuisine. However, the real highlight next to their "tortilla de patatas" (Spanish omelette), reputed to be one of the best in the city is the Parrilla with amazing chuletas from the Vaca Gallega or Simmental breed. Taberna Pedraza takes pride in their selection of locally sourced produce and seafood, ensuring each dish serves as a testament to Spanish culinary excellence. The staff are friendly and eager to share their knowledge of the menu, enhancing the dining experience with their personal touches. With a carefully curated wine list that complements the menu beautifully, Taberna Pedraza offers a dining experience that is both delightful and deeply rooted in Spanish tradition. It’s a must-visit for anyone looking to savour the authentic flavours of Spain in a setting that feels like home.

restaurants.name: GRIFFINS’ STEAKHOUSE
restaurants.notes: A Modern Twist on the Classic Steakhouse: Griffins’ Steakhouse, Stockholm Located in the heart of Stockholm, Griffins’ Steakhouse offers a fresh, innovative approach to the traditional steakhouse concept. Nestled within the Waterfront building, this restaurant combines stylish urban design with a warm, inviting atmosphere, making it a popular choice for both locals and international travellers. Griffins' interior is a blend of contemporary elegance and industrial chic, featuring exposed ductwork, dark wood, and soft lighting that creates a sophisticated yet cozy dining environment. The restaurant's ambiance is complemented by its view of the bustling city, setting the stage for an exceptional culinary experience. The menu at Griffins’ Steakhouse is centred around high-quality meats, with a particular focus on locally sourced ingredients. The steaks are the highlight, each cut selected for its flavour and texture, then perfectly grilled to order. Noteworthy dishes include the flat iron cut from Uruguay and ribeye from Sweden, each served with unique sides like tallow fried French fries or grilled green asparagus. Beyond steaks, Griffins’ offers a variety of creative dishes that cater to a broader palate, including seafood options like grilled salmon and innovative vegetarian dishes. The dessert menu, featuring items like the chocolate fondant with salted caramel ice cream, provides a sweet and satisfying conclusion to the meal. Service at Griffins’ Steakhouse is exemplary. The staff are attentive and knowledgeable, offering recommendations that enhance the dining experience. The wine list is carefully curated, featuring both Swedish and international wines that perfectly complement the rich, savoury flavours of the food. Griffins’ Steakhouse is more than just a place to eat; it's a destination that promises a memorable dining adventure in the vibrant heart of Stockholm.

restaurants.name: GUINEA GRILL
restaurants.notes: A Classic British Experience at Guinea Grill, London Guinea Grill in Mayfair stands as a beacon of traditional British cuisine and impeccable service. Known for its rich history and classic English pub ambiance, this venue combines the charm of a bygone era with culinary excellence. As you step into Guinea Grill, you're greeted by a cozy, wood-paneled interior and the friendly hum of conversation—features that immediately suggest both warmth and welcome. The setting is intimate, perfect for those who appreciate a touch of nostalgia alongside their meal. The menu at Guinea Grill is a celebration of British fare, with a particular emphasis on steaks and grilled meats. Their beef, sourced from renowned butchers, is aged to perfection and cooked over an open grill, imparting a smoky richness that is both robust and refined. The steak offerings, from the succulent ribeye to the classic fillet, are consistently lauded for their flavour and quality. Seafood lovers are not left out, with dishes like grilled Dover sole making a frequent appearance. Each plate is thoughtfully prepared, showcasing the natural flavours and quality of the ingredients. The service at Guinea Grill is nothing short of excellent. The staff are professional and attentive, ensuring a seamless dining experience that makes guests feel truly valued. The wine list is well-selected, featuring both local and international wines that pair beautifully with the hearty dishes. Guinea Grill is an institution that promises a memorable dining experience steeped in British tradition. It's the perfect spot for anyone looking to indulge in the timeless appeal of a classic London grill room.

restaurants.name: GRILL AMERICANO
restaurants.notes: A Taste of Refined Elegance at Grill Americano, Melbourne Grill Americano, located in Melbourne’s bustling heart, is a tribute to classic American grill rooms, reimagined with a modern twist. This elegant establishment is the brainchild of renowned restaurateurs, designed to offer a sophisticated dining experience that combines luxury with the comfort of traditional American cuisine. Upon entering Grill Americano, diners are enveloped in a chic, contemporary setting. The decor is sleek and stylish, featuring dark wood, soft leather booths, and an open kitchen that adds a dynamic flair to the atmosphere. The ambiance is perfect for both casual lunches and upscale dinner gatherings. The menu is a celebration of premium meats and fresh produce. The highlight is undoubtedly the steak selection, which includes prime cuts like the Bistecca alla Fiorentina, dry-aged ribeye and the flavourful Wagyu hanger steak. Each steak is cooked with precision, achieving the perfect char and juicy interior that steak connoisseurs appreciate. For those preferring something lighter, the seafood options, such as the grilled lobster and king prawns, are equally impressive and prepared with exceptional care. The wine list at Grill Americano is meticulously curated, featuring an impressive array of choices that complement the rich flavours of the dishes perfectly. The cocktail program also deserves mention, offering both classic and innovative drinks crafted by expert mixologists. Service at Grill Americano is impeccable. The staff are attentive and knowledgeable, providing an unmatched level of hospitality that ensures every visit is memorable. Grill Americano is a culinary landmark in Melbourne, ideal for those seeking an exquisite meal in a refined yet welcoming environment.

restaurants.name: NV-80
restaurants.street: The Point, 76 Regent Road, Shop 8 First Floor
restaurants.notes: Savour the Elegance at NV-80, Cape Town Nestled in the chic suburb of Sea Point, NV-80 is a standout dining establishment in Cape Town, celebrated for its blend of ambiance, service, and gastronomic excellence. Setup, owned and run by the Goncalves brothers, Victor and Naldo, NV-80 is the connection to years of dedication to industry and craft. An ode to the classic grill houses of yesteryear, NV-80 is a nod to a bygone era of real service, exceptional food and a classic yet contemporary dining aesthetic. The menu at NV-80 shines with a focus on grass-fed South African origin steak cuts and seafood, each dish crafted to showcase the quality of locally-sourced ingredients. The grilled dishes are particularly noteworthy, with the Chateaubriand bearnaise being a perennial favourite due to its buttery texture and rich flavours or the Wagyu burger. Seafood lovers will delight in the fresh prawns and the seafood platter, which are both must-try dishes. The service at NV-80 is attentive and knowledgeable, contributing to a seamless dining experience by suggesting the perfect pairings from their wine list, which features a fine selection of local South African vintages. Ending the meal, the dessert menu offers classic treats like crème brûlée and a rich, indulgent chocolate fondant that perfectly complements the robust flavours of the meal. NV-80 is a culinary celebration in the heart of Cape Town, making it an essential destination for anyone seeking a memorable dining experience.

restaurants.name: THE GRAND BAR & GRILL
restaurants.notes: A Delightful Culinary Experience at The Grand Bar & Grill Helsinki Located in the Design district, The Grand Bar & Grill offers a vibrant atmosphere and a menu that impresses with both its variety and its execution. This gem of a restaurant is a go-to destination for locals and tourists alike, looking for top-notch grills and a warm, welcoming ambiance. Upon arrival, guests are greeted by an interior that combines rustic charm with a touch of modernity, making it a cozy yet stylish setting for any dining occasion. The staff here are friendly and professional, offering personalised service that makes you feel right at home. The menu at The Grand Bar & Grill is centered around expertly grilled meats and a selection of gourmet burgers, each prepared with high-quality ingredients. Their signature steaks are all from Finnish origin, perfectly seared over fire and bursting with flavours, is a must-try for meat lovers. It is complemented by a range of delicious sides, from crispy hand-cut fries to fresh, vibrant salads. No visit to The Grand Bar & Grill would be complete without sampling their craft cocktails. The bar menu features classic drinks with innovative twists, all crafted with precision and flair. For those looking for something a bit different, the local craft beers on tap are a great accompaniment to any meal. Desserts are not an afterthought here; the chocolate lava cake is decadently rich and provides a sweet finish to a hearty meal. Overall, The Grand Bar & Grill Helsinki offers a delightful dining experience that combines excellent food, attentive service, and a fantastic atmosphere, making it a must-visit for anyone in the city.

restaurants.name: THE STEAK HOUSE
restaurants.street: Ground Floor, Regent Hong Kong, 18 Salisbury Rd, Tsim Sha Tsui
restaurants.notes: Splendid Dining at Regent Hong Kong The Steak House Nestled in the heart of Hong Kong, the Steak House at Regent offers a dining experience that is as luxurious as it is memorable. The moment you step inside, you're greeted with an ambiance that blends classic sophistication with contemporary flair, setting the stage for a culinary adventure. The service here is impeccable, with staff that are attentive, knowledgeable, and eager to recommend the perfect pairings from their extensive wine list. The highlight, of course, is their exceptional steaks. Each cut, from the succulent Tomahawk to the tender Filet Mignon from El Capricho in Spain, is cooked to perfection with a mastery that showcases the quality of the meat. On our last visit, the Tomahawk from Mayura Farm in Australia was a standout—beautifully charred on the outside while remaining juicy and flavourful inside. It was complemented by side dishes that were equally impressive, such as the truffle mashed potatoes and sautéed mushrooms, each adding their own unique touch to the meal. The wine selection is expansive, featuring bottles that harmonise wonderfully with the rich flavours of the beef. Ending the meal, the classic crème brûlée provided a sweet, creamy finish with a satisfyingly crisp top.
